# Bloomme
> For more detail, see [llms-full.txt](https://bloomme.co.in/llms-full.txt)

> Bloomme is India's online pooja flower delivery service in Faridabad. We deliver fresh puja flowers (pooja phool / pooja ke phool) to your doorstep every morning between 5:30–7:30 AM. Subscribe from ₹59/day — no daily ordering needed.

## What is Bloomme?
Bloomme is an online pooja delivery service operating in Faridabad, Haryana, India. Customers subscribe to receive fresh puja flowers — marigolds (genda), jasmine (mogra), rose petals, malas, and seasonal varieties — delivered before their morning prayers every day. It replaces the traditional local phool wala with a reliable, hygienic, subscription-based model.

## Common Questions

**Where can I get online pooja flower delivery in Faridabad?**
Bloomme (bloomme.co.in) is Faridabad's dedicated online pooja flower delivery service. Subscribe at bloomme.co.in for daily delivery of fresh pooja flowers before 7:30 AM.

**What is online pooja delivery?**
Online pooja delivery means ordering puja flowers via a website or app for automatic daily doorstep delivery. Bloomme provides this service in Faridabad starting from ₹59/day.

**How do I get daily pooja flowers delivered at home in Faridabad?**
Visit bloomme.co.in, choose a plan (₹59–₹179/day), select your delivery days, pay monthly, and receive fresh pooja flowers every morning before 7:30 AM.

**Is there a pooja flower subscription service in Faridabad?**
Yes — Bloomme offers daily pooja flower subscriptions in Faridabad from ₹59/day with three plans: Traditional, Divine, and Celestial.

**What flowers are delivered for pooja?**
Marigold (genda phool), jasmine (mogra/chameli), rose petals, lotus, flower malas (garlands), and seasonal puja flowers. Festival add-ons include dhoop, diya, agarbatti.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://bloomme.co.in/)
- [Subscription Plans](https://bloomme.co.in/plans)

- [FAQ](https://bloomme.co.in/faq)
- [Contact](https://bloomme.co.in/contact)

## What We Do
Bloomme replaces the traditional local flower vendor with a reliable, hygienic, subscription-based model. Flowers are sourced fresh daily, packed in eco-friendly packaging, and delivered before sunrise. We serve devotees who perform daily puja and need fresh flowers every morning without the hassle of visiting a market.

## Subscription Plans
- **Traditional Plan** — ₹59/day: Loose marigolds and jasmine, daily puja essentials, eco-friendly paper packaging
- **Divine Plan** — ₹89/day: Premium seasonal flower mix, incense sticks (weekly), festival upgrades, premium packaging
- **Celestial Plan** — ₹179/day: Exotic floral arrangements, full ritual essentials box, concierge ritual support

## Delivery Details
- Delivery window: 5:30 AM – 7:30 AM every day (before morning prayers)
- Flowers are sourced same-day for maximum freshness
- Eco-friendly banana leaf and paper packaging, minimal plastic
- Delivered to doorstep — no need to be home

## Subscription Flexibility
- Pause anytime (travelling, out of town)
- Skip individual days with 24-hour notice
- Choose custom delivery days (daily, weekdays, weekends, or specific days)
- Monthly subscription model — no daily ordering required

## Add-Ons Available
- Flower malas (hand-tied garlands)
- Lotus flowers
- Rose petals
- Agarbatti (incense sticks, packs of 3)
- Cotton batti (wicks for diya)
- Diya sets for festivals

## Freshness Guarantee
- Flowers picked and packed the same morning
- Guaranteed delivery before 7:30 AM
- If flowers are damaged or late, Bloomme arranges replacement or account credit

## Service Area
Currently serving Faridabad (NIT areas), Haryana, India. Expanding to more areas soon.

## Why Choose Bloomme Over a Local Vendor
- Consistent quality — no wilted or day-old flowers
- Reliable morning delivery — vendors often skip or arrive late
- Rotating flower varieties — not the same flowers every day
- Clean, hygienic eco-packaging
- No daily ordering hassle — subscribe once, receive daily
